name: UniPairs
description: PongFu Master the Paddle. Embrace the Panda. Welcome to PongFu, the ultimate ping-pong adventure set in a vibrant panda world! Step into a bamboo-filled arena where reflexes, timing, and a little kung-fu spirit determine who rules the table. Play as an energetic panda warrior, spinning, smashing, and slicing your way to victory with lightning-fast paddle skills.
